title: Seedling vigor
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"50akm","text":"Select five plots as standard: 1 (weakest) - 5 (strongest), then other plots will be scored based on the similar with which standard plot.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8rhot","text":"Seedling vigor is based on the size of seedling, greenness, uniformity","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e1m55","text":"Score each plot for seeding vigor was phenotyped by plot","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fmt7q","text":"Seedling vigor was phenotyped every other day for six times","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2komh","text":"Seedling vigor phenotyping was started after 15 days of planting or 10 days after emergence","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Go through the field and identify five plots to use as standards that represent scores ranging from 1 to 5
Go through the field to do seedling vigor phenotyping by compare the seedling with the standard plot
Assign a score between 1 and 5 to each plot using the scale developed from standard plots
creator: David S LeBauer
